reason: Design doc for this task — feature scope, resolved Q1–Q8, file list, code outlines, manifest-driven configSectionsAdded shape.
Entry point for cli backend specs — pointers to migrations / platform-integration / workflow-state-contract / script-conventions / quality-guidelines.
Contract for [workflow-state:STATUS] tag blocks in workflow.md and how inject-workflow-state.py consumes them. New `[workflow-state:STATUS-inline]` variants must follow this contract.
Manifest schema reference — adding a new optional field `configSectionsAdded` to the manifest type and 0.5.8.json. Changes must align with existing manifest field conventions.
Class-1 vs class-2 platform definitions; codex specifics (PreToolUse-only-for-Bash, no CollabAgentSpawn). Establishes why this knob is codex-only.
Conventions for Python scripts under templates/trellis/scripts/common/ — relevant for new trellis_config.py + modifications to workflow_phase.py and inject-workflow-state.py.
